text: Entering this space I notice a mood both clinical and curious: glass, bright lighting, and technology all contribute to a sense of purpose. The words 'R+D' suggest innovation, research, and development—a space of experimentation or learning. I feel a quiet anticipation, almost reverence, as if stepping into a realm where ideas are both nurtured and challenged. The visual energy hints at human ingenuity, and my mind becomes attentive, eager to see what innovations or reflections might be sparked here.
